violations.text: Ambient temperature of the counter lowboy unit was observed held at 44 degrees Fahrenheit. Half & Half in this unit observed at 44 degrees F. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Service call placed. TCS products were moved to properly functioning unit. No TCS foods are to be stored in this unit until it is maintaining consistent temperature at/below 41 degrees F. New Violation. Correct By: 01/13/2025

The doors to the outside, located at the entrance, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 01/17/2025
Refrigerator door gasket of the lowboy freezer unit observed in poor repair, split away from the door. Gasket is to be replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 01/31/2025

The floor in a couple of areas of the kitchen (near ice machine/handsink and at the fryolater/service line area) is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/28/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of brown/black/pink residues. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine is being emptied to clean and sanitized today. New Violation. Correct By: 11/21/2023

The doors to the outside, located in the receiving area and at the entrance, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 11/30/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice cream machine have an accumulation of dried food residue and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 11/21/2023
One of the faucets at the 3-bay sink is in poor repair. The faucet does not shut off completely. Plumbing must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/30/2023

The floor and wall junctures to the side of the grease trap do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 01/01/2024
The floor in the mop sink is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the mop sink area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 11/30/2023
